title: LifeLink
description: When One Person Dies, Everyone Dies.
body:
a lifelink datapack. when one person dies, everyone in the session dies. this pack is inspired by lifelink events from the past.

what marks the difference in this pack is the reward track i have designed for it. here's how it works: someone mined diamonds? everyone gets diamonds. someone crafted an enchanting table? everyone gets lapis. this was my way of making the experience more fun, and less likely to become a miserable slog. it also helps keep it from reaching beyond a 4-6 hour experience.

if you want to play without this reward track, just download a Plain_ version.
